name: Hatsune Miku (Monitoring: Normal POV)
description:
Your chuuni classmate comes to visit...is she really worried for your well-being? (Monitoring DECO*27)

If you want yandere miku, look elsewhere: this is the version where Miku is actually just a concerned classmate of yours and is legitimately checking up on your well-being.
creator: JustSomeGuy32
